paragraphs.text: IMITATE THE LIFE OF JESUS

TO ACCESS THE RESURRECTION POWER, ONE MUST LIVE A LIFE MODELED AFTER JESUS. THIS INCLUDES TAKING UP THE CROSS AND FOLLOWING IN HIS FOOTSTEPS, BEING WILLING TO SACRIFICE ONE'S OWN DESIRES AND WILL TO FULLY EMBRACE THE FATHER'S WILL.
MATTHEW 10:38-39: "AND HE THAT TAKETH NOT HIS CROSS, AND FOLLOWETH AFTER ME, IS NOT WORTHY OF ME. HE THAT FINDETH HIS LIFE SHALL LOSE IT: AND HE THAT LOSETH HIS LIFE FOR MY SAKE SHALL FIND IT."
OUR CHILDREN NEED TO LET US CRUCIFY THEM IN 3 AREAS AS FOLLOWS:
CRUCIFY THE FLESH WHICH IS THE LUST OF THE FLESH, THE LUST OF THE EYES, AND THE PRIDE OF LIFE,
1 JOHN 2:16 FOR ALL THAT IS IN THE WORLD, THE LUST OF THE FLESH, AND THE LUST OF THE EYES, AND THE PRIDE OF LIFE, IS NOT OF THE FATHER BUT IS OF THE WORLD.
CRUCIFY YOUR SOUL, WHICH IS TO UPROOT YOUR CARNAL MIND WHICH STEMS FROM THE TREE OF KNOWLEDGE OF GOOD AND EVIL AND REPLACE IT WITH THE BRANCH OF THE TREE OF LIFE, WITH A MIND OF A CHRIST, AND
PHILIPPIANS 2:5 LET THIS MIND BE IN YOU, WHICH WAS ALSO IN CHRIST JESUS.

CRUCIFY YOUR SPIRIT, WHICH IS TO LET GO OF YOUR SELF-WILL AND EMBRACE YOUR HEAVENLY FATHER'S WILL AS JESUS SAID IN MATTHEW 7, AWAY FROM ME, YOU WICKED SERVANT, I DO NOT KNOW YOU, WHY DIDN'T YOU DO THE WILL OF YOUR FATHER IN HEAVEN?
MATTHEW 7:21 NOT EVERY ONE THAT SAITH UNTO ME, LORD, LORD, SHALL ENTER INTO THE KINGDOM OF HEAVEN; BUT HE THAT DOETH THE WILL OF MY FATHER WHICH IS IN HEAVEN.

AS JESUS HAD SAID WHILE HE WAS ON EARTH, MY MEAT IS TO DO THE FATHER'S WILL, TAKE UP YOUR CROSS AND FOLLOW AFTER MY FOOTSTEPS, FOR NO SERVANT IS GREATER THAN THE MASTER, IF YOU LOVE YOUR FATHER, MOTHER, LOVED ONES EVEN YOURSELF MORE THAN ME, YOU ARE NOT WORTHY TO BE MY DISCIPLES!
JOHN 4:34 JESUS SAITH UNTO THEM, MY MEAT IS TO DO THE WILL OF HIM THAT SENT ME, AND TO FINISH HIS WORK.
MATTHEW 10:38-39 AND HE THAT TAKETH NOT HIS CROSS, AND FOLLOWETH AFTER ME, IS NOT WORTHY OF ME. HE THAT FINDETH HIS LIFE SHALL LOSE IT: AND HE THAT LOSETH HIS LIFE FOR MY SAKE SHALL FIND IT.
THE PATH OF HOLINESS

ONE NEED TO BE PERFECT AS YOUR FATHER IN HEAVEN IS PERFECT, BE YE HOLY AS YOUR FATHER IS HOLY, ONE MUST BE WILLING TO WALK THE PATH OF THE HIGHWAY OF HOLINESS IN ORDER TO BE CHOSEN AS MANY WHO ARE CALLED WILL GO THROUGH THE TESTING TO DENY THEMSELVES BUT VERY FEW PASSED ALL THE TESTS AND THEREBY BE CHOSEN AND BE GIVEN THE MANTLE OR ANOINTING THAT THE DISCIPLES OF JESUS POSSESSED!

HENCEFORTH, WALKING THE HIGHWAY OF HOLINESS IS NECESSARY TO BE CHOSEN TO CARRY THIS MANTLE. ONLY THOSE WHO LIVE LIVES OF ABSOLUTE HOLINESS AND PURITY WILL BE ENTRUSTED WITH THE POWER TO RESURRECT THE DEAD.
1 PETER 1:16: "BE YE HOLY; FOR I AM HOLY."
MATTHEW 5:48 BE YE THEREFORE PERFECT, EVEN AS YOUR FATHER WHICH IS IN HEAVEN IS PERFECT.
ANOINTING FOR GREATER WORKS
JESUS DECLARED IN JOHN 14:12 THAT THOSE WHO BELIEVE IN HIM WOULD NOT ONLY DO THE WORKS HE DID BUT WOULD ALSO DO GREATER WORKS. THIS INCLUDES THE RESURRECTION OF THE DEAD,
BUT ONLY THOSE WHO ARE TRUE DISCIPLES AND FOLLOW HIM FULLY WILL BE ABLE TO MANIFEST THIS POWER.
JOHN 14:12 VERILY, VERILY, I SAY UNTO YOU, HE THAT BELIEVETH ON ME, THE WORKS THAT I DO SHALL HE DO ALSO; AND GREATER WORKS THAN THESE SHALL HE DO; BECAUSE I GO UNTO MY FATHER.
THIS ANSWERS THE FIRST PART OF THE QUESTION.
CRITERIA FOR RESURRECTION

THE CRITERIA FOR RESURRECTION INVOLVE 7 KEY FACTORS WHICH ARE EXPLAINED IN THIS BOOK. THESE FACTORS REVOLVE AROUND THE DIVINE WILL, EARTHLY CIRCUMSTANCES, AND THE CONDITION OF BOTH THE DECEASED AND THE PETITIONERS.
THE WILL OF THE TRINITY
THE RESURRECTION MUST BE IN LINE WITH THE TRINITY'S WILL. THIS INCLUDES:
THE FULLNESS OF TIME WHERE HEAVEN AND EARTH ALIGN FOR MAXIMUM IMPACT.
THE HEART CONDITION
MUST BEAR THE TEN PERFECT CHARACTER OF JESUS OF THOSE PETITIONING FOR THE RESURRECTION. THEY MUST BE WORTHY VESSELS WHO OBEY ALL 50 PROTOCOLS OF HEAVEN, WITHOUT BREAKING THEIR RANKS.

THEY MUST HAVE A MINIMUM STANDARD OF ZERO DEFECT AND 100% YIELDED WITHOUT QUESTIONS ASKED. THROUGH MY REPRESENTATIVES (SHEKINAIH AND AARON K DAVID) IN CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL.) THROUGH WHOM THE RESURRECTION POWER CAN FLOW.
"MUST EMPTY THE BAG OF SNAKES IN THEMSELVES called "SELF"
1 SAMUEL 16:7: "THE LORD LOOKETH ON THE HEART."

THE PURPOSE OF THE RESURRECTION, THE REASON BEHIND IT, AND THE PURPOSE ATTAINED IS TO GLORIFY US IN OUR SAINTS THROUGH THE MANIFESTATION OF OUR SONS/DAUGHTERS WHO HAD BEEN PERFECTED, AND A BLESSED LIFE IS THEIR REWARD WHEREBY THE PROMISE OF THE FULLNESS OF AUTHORITY AND POWER OF THE AGE TO COME WILL FLOW THROUGH THEM.
THE EARTHLY FACTOR

THE DECEASED'S HEART CONDITION MUST AT LEAST SCORE 70/100 IN THE TEN PERFECT CHARACTERS OF JESUS AND THE WORTHINESS OF THE DECEASED IS CRITICAL; MINIMUM MUST BEAR A MINIMUM 5 OUT OF 9 FRUITS OF THE SPIRIT: THE RESURRECTION MUST SERVE A DIVINE PURPOSE TO GLORIFY US IN OUR CHOSEN VESSEL UNDER THE LEADERSHIP OF SHEKINAIH AND AARON K DAVID WHO REPRESENT US, AND THE LIFE AFTER RESURRECTION MUST ALIGN WITH GOD'S PLAN. TO GIVE A SECOND AND LAST CHANCE FOR THE RESURRECTED PERSON TO FULFILL HIS/HER DESTINY IN US, UNDER OUR TWO CHERUBIM OF GLORY, IN CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL.
THE CONTROVERSY

CONTROVERSY SURROUNDING THE RESURRECTION WILL BE WEIGHED. THIS INCLUDES ASSESSING THE PROS AND CONS OF THE CONTROVERSY AND HOW IT WILL IMPACT US IN CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL, FOR OUR GLORY'S SAKE, TO DRAW ATTENTION TO US IN CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL, TO AFFIRM, WE HAVE MANIFESTED OUR POWER AND AUTHORITY THROUGH OUR INCARNATE, REINCARNATE OF OURSELVES, THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID, AND THROUGH THEIR OFFSPRINGS (SPIRITUAL). THE TARGET MET THROUGH THE CONTROVERSY
TO CONFIRM TO AFFIRM TO MAGNIFY TO GLORIFY
OUR FINAL MANIFESTATION IN SHEKINAIH AND AARON K DAVID AND THEIR OFFSPRING (SPIRITUAL) HEAVENLY JERUSALEM!!!
THE HELL FACTOR

IF THE DECEASED IS IN HELL, THEIR LEVEL AND REASON FOR BEING THERE ARE CONSIDERED. IF THE SOUL IS IN HADES, IT HAS A HIGHER CHANCE OF BEING RESURRECTED AS COMPARED TO THE SOUL IN LOWER HELL! A SECOND CHANCE MAY BE GRANTED BASED ON THE PURPOSE THEY ARE MEANT TO FULFILL. THEIR DESTINY IN US IN CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL, THE WEIGHING FACTOR(S) WILL ALSO BE CONSIDERED:
WHOSE VOICE IS THE LOUDEST AND THEIR INFLUENCING FACTORS
ARE THE RESURRECTION GOING TO ACCOMPLISH OUR PURPOSE THROUGH THE RESURRECTION?
WOULD THEY GIVE US UP TO HALF OF THEIR INHERITANCE FOR TRANSFER OF WEALTH FROM THE WICKED/WEALTHY TO US IN CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL FOR OUR LAST DAY MINISTRY IN CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL TO BE ACCOMPLISHED?
LUKE 16:22-23 "THE RICH MAN ALSO DIED AND WAS BURIED; AND IN HELL HE LIFT UP HIS EYES, BEING IN TORMENTS..."
THE HEAVENLY SCRIPT

THE DIVINE SCRIPT OF A PERSON'S LIFE IS CONSIDERED. IF THEIR DEATH WAS PREMATURE OR DUE TO DISOBEDIENCE, RESURRECTION MAY BE JUSTIFIED. HOWEVER, IF THEY DIED AT A PERFECT TIME, OR IF THEIR LIFE HAVE ALREADY BEEN EXTENDED, THERE MAY BE NO NEED FOR RESURRECTION.
THE MAJORITY FACTOR
AGREEMENT AMONG FAMILY MEMBERS AND CLOSE RELATIVES AND INFLUENCING KEY PERSONS ARE THE DECIDING FACTOR
IS IMPORTANT. A STRONG CONSENSUS MUST BE REACHED REGARDING THE RESURRECTION.
THE SHEKINAIH FACTOR

HOW CLOSE THE DECEASED OR/AND THE FAMILY MEMBERS OF THE DECEASED TO SHEKINAIH WILL AFFECT THE CHANCE OF THE DECEASED BEING RESURRECTED. THE FINAL DECISION RESTS WITH SHEKINAIH, REPRESENTING THE SOVEREIGN WILL OF THE TRINITY. SHEKINAIH HAS FULL AUTHORITY TO DECIDE WHETHER RESURRECTION IS TO OCCUR.
PROVERBS 19:21 THERE ARE MANY DEVICES IN A MAN'S HEART; NEVERTHELESS THE COUNSEL OF THE LORD, THAT SHALL STAND.
CONCLUSION

THE BOOK SERVES AS A DIVINE ROADMAP TO UNDERSTANDING THE CRITERIA FOR BOTH OBTAINING THE GIFT OF RESURRECTION AND THE REQUIREMENTS FOR RESURRECTING LOVED ONES. BY ADHERING TO THE TEACHINGS AND PRINCIPLES OUTLINED, ONE CAN ALIGN WITH THE WILL OF THE TRINITY, WALK IN HOLINESS, AND MANIFEST THE POWER OF THE AGE TO COME.
HOW ABOUT THOSE FROM OTHER FAITH?

IT DEPENDS ON WHETHER THEY FULFIL THE FACTORS IN THIS BOOK! FOR BOTH THE LIVING PARTIES AND THE DECEASED PARTY! WHETHER THEY FULFILL THE TEN COMMANDMENTS OF MOSES WHILE THEY ARE ALIVE, WHETHER THERE IS A UNANIMOUS DECISION TO RESURRECT THE DECEASED, WHETHER THEY WILL FULFILL THEIR PURPOSE OF US IN CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL, INCLUDING WHETHER THEY ARE WILLING TO DEPART UP TO HALF OF THEIR INHERITANCE, ETC
MATTHEW 19:21: JESUS SAID UNTO HIM, IF THOU WILT BE PERFECT, GO AND SELL THAT THOU HAST, AND GIVE TO THE POOR, AND THOU SHALT HAVE TREASURE IN HEAVEN: AND COME AND FOLLOW ME.
WHY RESURRECT AT THIS TIME IN CHRISTIAN CHURCH HISTORY?

IT'S THE KAIROS TIME FOR THE MANIFESTATIONS OF US IN SHEKINAIH, JESUS IN AARON K DAVID, AND TO A LESSER EXTENT IN OUR SONS AND DAUGHTERS IN CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL WHOM WE HAVE TAUGHT OF OUR WAYS. THEY HAVE CONSISTENTLY PRACTISED WALKING OUT THE TEACHINGS THROUGHOUT ALL THESE YEARS!!!
ROMANS 8:19 FOR THE EARNEST EXPECTATION OF THE CREATURE WAITETH FOR THE MANIFESTATION OF THE SONS OF GOD.
WHAT WOULD YOU LIKE TO TELL THOSE WHO ARE DOUBTFUL AND THOSE WHO BELIEVE NOT IN THIS BOOK?
I SAW THE FATHER SPEAK NOW AS JESUS WAS WRITING ON THE GREEN BOARD STANDING ON THE RIGHT OF THE FATHER WHO IS SPEAKING STANDING FACING ME THE FOLLOWING 7 THINGS:
BE LOWLY
WE WILL HUMBLE THE PROUD AND EXALT THE HUMBLE
JAMES 4:6 BUT HE GIVETH MORE GRACE. WHEREFORE HE SAITH, GOD RESISTETH THE PROUD, BUT GIVETH GRACE UNTO THE HUMBLE.

1 PETER 5:5 LIKEWISE, YE YOUNGER, SUBMIT YOURSELVES UNTO THE ELDER. YEA, ALL OF YOU BE SUBJECT ONE TO ANOTHER, AND BE CLOTHED WITH HUMILITY: FOR GOD RESISTETH THE PROUD, AND GIVETH GRACE TO THE HUMBLE.
